response.justification: The candidate is a strong generalist engineer with ~18 years of experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems, plus current hands-on exposure to MCP servers and agentic-workflow tooling at re:cinq. However, the role requires 8+ years building production AI-driven solutions, and the resume shows only about a year of GenAI-adjacent work with no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, or LLM optimization. Customer-facing technical discovery and enterprise delivery experience is also thin, making the fit for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role uncertain despite solid engineering fundamentals.
strengths: Current hands-on MCP and agentic-workflow tooling experience, directly relevant to key technologies
Deep full-stack engineering background (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK) with production systems at scale
Strong craftsmanship, mentoring, and knowledge-sharing track record (workshops, TDD, open source)
concerns: Falls far short of the required 8+ years building AI-driven solutions
No demonstrated RAG, vector database, data-pipeline, or LLM evaluation experience
Limited evidence of customer-facing discovery leadership or enterprise consulting delivery

key_factors.factor: Strong general engineering and mentoring depth
